org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism

Interface ModelObject

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Comparable<ModelObject>, Serializable
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    Anchor<G,N,A,E>, Edge<G,N,A,E>, Graph<G,N,A,E>, Node<G,N,A,E>
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractAnchor, AbstractEdge, AbstractFSMNode, AbstractModelObject, AbstractNode, AbstractStandardNode, FiniteStateMachine, FSMAnchor, FSMEndPoint, FSMStartPoint, FSMState, FSMTransition, StandardAnchor, StandardEdge, StandardGraph, StandardMonoAnchorNode, StandardMultiAnchorNode

    public interface ModelObject
extends Comparable<ModelObject>, Serializable
    This is the semantic object that composes a graph model.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:02:58
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-formalism

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addModelObjectListener(ModelObjectListener listener)
      Add Listener on changes in this object.
      ModelObject findModelObject(UUID id)
      Find, in a deep way, the model object that has the specified id.
      ModelObjectEvent fireComponentAdded(ModelObject component)
      Notifies the listener about the addition of a component in this model object.
      ModelObjectEvent fireComponentRemoved(ModelObject component)
      Notifies the listener about the remove of a component in this model object.
      ModelObjectEvent fireContainerChanged(ModelObject oldContainer, ModelObject newContainer)
      Notifies the listener about the change of the container of this model object.
      ModelObjectEvent fireContentChanged(ModelObjectEvent cause)
      Notifies the listener about the change of the content of this model object.
      ModelObjectEvent fireLinkChanged(ModelObject oldLinkedObject, ModelObject newLinkedObject)
      Notifies the listener about the change of a link of this model object.
      ModelObjectEvent firePropertyChanged(String propertyName, Object oldValue, Object newValue)
      Notifies the listener about the change of a property of this model object.
      URL getMetamodelSpecification()
      Replies the URL that permits to download the specified of the metamodel for this element.
      String getName()
      Replies the name of this object.
      Map<String,Object> getProperties()
      Replies all the properties of the model object, except the UUID.
      Map<String,Class<?>> getUIEditableProperties()
      Replies the definitions of the properties that may be edited through an UI.
      UUID getUUID()
      Replies the identifier of this object.
      ViewBinding getViewBinding()
      Replies the manager of views for this model element.
      void removeModelObjectListener(ModelObjectListener listener)
      Add Listener on changes in this object.
      void setName(String name)
      Set the name of this object.
      void setProperties(Map<String,Object> properties)
      Set the properties of the model object, except the UUID.
      void setUUID(UUID uuid)
      Set the identifier of this object.

      • Methods inherited from interface java.lang.Comparable

        compareTo

    • Method Detail

      • getUUID

        UUID getUUID()
        Replies the identifier of this object.
        Returns:
        the identifier of this object.

      • getMetamodelSpecification

        URL getMetamodelSpecification()
        Replies the URL that permits to download the specified of the metamodel for this element.
        Returns:
        the url of the schema for this model object. If null the default specification from NetEditor is assumed.

      • findModelObject

        ModelObject findModelObject(UUID id)
        Find, in a deep way, the model object that has the specified id. This method goes through all the model objects and sub-model objects.
        Parameters:
        id -
        Returns:
        the object with the specified id, or null.

      • setUUID

        void setUUID(UUID uuid)
        Set the identifier of this object. The name of the property is "uuid".
        Parameters:
        uuid - is the identifier of this object.

      • getName

        String getName()
        Replies the name of this object.
        Returns:
        the name of this object.

      • setName

        void setName(String name)
        Set the name of this object. The name of the property is "name".
        Parameters:
        name - is the name of this object.

      • addModelObjectListener

        void addModelObjectListener(ModelObjectListener listener)
        Add Listener on changes in this object.
        Parameters:
        listener -

      • removeModelObjectListener

        void removeModelObjectListener(ModelObjectListener listener)
        Add Listener on changes in this object.
        Parameters:
        listener -

      • getViewBinding

        ViewBinding getViewBinding()
        Replies the manager of views for this model element.
        Returns:
        the manager of views.

      • firePropertyChanged

        ModelObjectEvent firePropertyChanged(String propertyName,
                                   Object oldValue,
                                   Object newValue)
        Notifies the listener about the change of a property of this model object.
        Parameters:
        propertyName - is the name of the property.
        oldValue - is the old value of the property.
        newValue - is the new value of the property.
        Returns:
        the fired event.

      • fireContainerChanged

        ModelObjectEvent fireContainerChanged(ModelObject oldContainer,
                                    ModelObject newContainer)
        Notifies the listener about the change of the container of this model object.
        Parameters:
        oldContainer - is the old container.
        newContainer - is the new container.
        Returns:
        the fired event.

      • fireComponentAdded

        ModelObjectEvent fireComponentAdded(ModelObject component)
        Notifies the listener about the addition of a component in this model object.
        Parameters:
        component - is the added component.
        Returns:
        the fired event.

      • fireComponentRemoved

        ModelObjectEvent fireComponentRemoved(ModelObject component)
        Notifies the listener about the remove of a component in this model object.
        Parameters:
        component - is the removed component.
        Returns:
        the fired event.

      • fireContentChanged

        ModelObjectEvent fireContentChanged(ModelObjectEvent cause)
        Notifies the listener about the change of the content of this model object.
        Parameters:
        cause - is the cause of the event. If null the cause of the event is not another event.
        Returns:
        the fired event.

      • fireLinkChanged

        ModelObjectEvent fireLinkChanged(ModelObject oldLinkedObject,
                               ModelObject newLinkedObject)
        Notifies the listener about the change of a link of this model object.
        Parameters:
        oldLinkedObject - is the old linked object.
        newLinkedObject - is the new linked object.
        Returns:
        the fired event.

      • getProperties

        Map<String,Object> getProperties()
        Replies all the properties of the model object, except the UUID.
        Returns:
        the properties of this model object, except the UUID.

      • getUIEditableProperties

        Map<String,Class<?>> getUIEditableProperties()
        Replies the definitions of the properties that may be edited through an UI.
        Returns:
        the properties.

      • setProperties

        void setProperties(Map<String,Object> properties)
        Set the properties of the model object, except the UUID.
        Parameters:
        properties - are the properties of this model object, except the UUID.
